calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Approving Trustee'S Resignation And For Order Amending Trust.
Off Calendar Jun-10-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Dobrov for Union Bank.

The Court questioned how Mr. Reid Weaver became successor co-trustee. Mr. Dobrov stated that he does not know and his client has no recollection of how he succeeded A.G. Luchsinger as co-trustee. Mr. Dobrov reported that he served the proof of service for his petition, but not on a Judicial Counsel form. The Court reminded Mr. Dobrov that from now on, the proper form must be used. The Petition for Order Approving Trustee's Resignation and for Order Amending Trust was granted (subject to review of written order).

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Nancy Bautista. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

Petition For Order Approving Trustee'S Resignation And For Order Amending Trust.
Off Calendar May-20-2013 Continued To Jun-10-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
